case_title: DOUG JALEN ET AL VS. MICHAEL MERRILL DESIGN STUDIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,486.45 FILED BY JALEN, DOUG JALEN, DEBRA AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL MERRILL DESIGN STUDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JALEN, DOUG JALEN, DEBRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL MERRILL DESIGN STUDIO PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED FEB-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL MERRILL DESIGN STUDIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE TWO PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM THE PLAINTIFF. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
